TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Budd Albright kawas tay 1936, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 8, Budd Albright, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya Budd Albright maki tay kawas 1958 msqun ki Sharon Lee, maki tay kawas 1961 t'alax. Sharon Lee hiya ga m'engi. 1958 kawas 9 byacing 21 ryax,hiya maki Santa Catalina Island's kekong. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ő≤u** alő≤ri…£ńßt kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ő≤u** alő≤ri…£ńßt, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. qnxan nja ő≤u** alő≤ri…£ńßt maki taj kawas~…ē **** ms~…ēqun ki s~…ēńßaron lee, maki taj kawas~…ē **** t Ēalax. s~…ēńßaron lee ńßija …£a m ĒeŇči. **** kawas~…ē * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax,ńßija maki s~…ēanta ¶~ ®atalina is~…ēlan* Ēs~…ē kekoŇč. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē

Sharon Lee hiya ga m'engi. 1958 kawas 9 byacing 21 ryax,hiya maki Santa Catalina Island's kekong. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
